<p class="key-answer" data-question="Eribulin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Eribulin</strong> 目前有 <strong>26 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Eribulin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Halaven monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of patients with locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer who have progressed after at least one chemotherapeutic regimens for advanced disease...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>autosomal recessive familial Mediterranean fever（99.8%）</li>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（99.7%）</li>
<li>pleural mesothelioma（99.5%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>malignant peritoneal mesothelioma（99.5%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>pleural adenomatoid tumor（99.5%）</li>
<li>pleural biphasic mesothelioma（99.4%）</li>
<li>fibroblastic neoplasm（99.4%）</li>
<li>pleural epithelioid mesothelioma（99.3%）</li>
<li>heart fibrosarcoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>well differentiated papillary mesothelioma（99.3%）</li>
<li>conventional fibrosarcoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>pericardium cancer（99.3%）</li>
<li>pleural sarcomatoid mesothelioma（99.3%）</li>
<li>kidney fibrosarcoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>lymphohistiocytoid mesothelioma（99.3%）</li>
<li>low grade fibromyxoid sarcoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>benign PEComa（99.0%）</li>
<li>uterine corpus perivascular epithelioid cell tumor（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/eribulin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
